DESCRIPTION: Check ADRION-systray-1.0.0.zip is not corrupted (file size 29MB)
Check uap_systray.exe present (30.7 MB)
Check uap_launcher.ps1 present
Verify Windows 10 (build 19041+) or Windows 11
netstat -ano | findstr :8002 && netstat -ano | findstr :8003
Verify at least 1GB free RAM available
Verify at least 500MB free disk space
Verify PowerShell 5.1+
Use Expand-Archive or Explorer to extract ZIP
Check EXE and PS1 files present after extraction
Copy to C:\Program Files\ADRION-systray\ if desired
Create shortcut to uap_systray.exe on desktop
Copy UAPsystray shortcut to Windows Startup folder
Execute uap_systray.exe
Wait 3-5 seconds for icon to appear in system tray
Icon should be solid green circle (not orange/red)
Check that no error/exception dialogs appeared
Right-click should show menu with 3 options
Menu should show: 'Open UAP', 'Status', 'Quit'
Should open browser to http://localhost:8003
Should show notification: 'Backend: Healthy' (green icon)
Browser should load without errors at http://localhost:8003
Check for logo ADRION 369 and navigation menu
Click 'Agents' - should show table with 4 agents (Librarian 95% trust)
Click 'Tasks' - should show table (may be empty on first run)
Click 'Genesis Log' - should show event history
GET http://localhost:8003/mapi/v1/health should return 200
GET http://localhost:8003/mapi/v1/agents should return list of 4 agents
GET http://localhost:8003/mapi/v1/tasks should return task list
System tray + backend should use <200MB RAM idle
CPU should be <5% idle
Dashboard should load within 2 seconds
Right-click > Quit option
Icon should vanish from system tray within 2 seconds
netstat -ano | findstr :8002 should show NO LISTENING
Get-Process -Name python* should show no UAP processes
Double-click uap_systray.exe again
Should behave identically to first launch
Verify dashboard loads and responds normally
Verify backend only listens to 127.0.0.1 (not 0.0.0.0)
Use netstat to confirm ports are local-only
Verify uap_systray.exe is executable and not world-readable
Verify logs/ folder contains timestamped entries
Get-EventLog -LogName Application -Newest 5 for UAP entries
Fill in DEPLOYMENT_TODO_SYSTRAY_LOCAL.md Section 13 template
List any bugs/problems discovered during testing
Document learnings for Electron refactor
git add uap/desktop/ && git commit -m 'Faza 1 QA Pass'
git tag -a v1.0.0-systray -m 'release notes'
Create RELEASE_NOTES_v1.0.0.md for distribution
git push origin feature/systray-mvp --tags
